outlook_paragraph: Devon Energy's drilling activity shows 14 active sites at decision date, all of which are continuously active, with no new sites activated recently. The relative activity delta of +1.8 indicates above-average operational continuity, supporting stable production volumes into the final quarter of the Permian and non-Permian operations, with slightly over half of activity concentrated in high-margin segments. Elevated WTI prices around $88/boe and a realized price differential of 91% bolster revenue potential. The deterministic forecast of $3.02B reflects this balanced activity and favorable price environment.
